title: Hungry Hearts
writer: Montague Glass, Julien Josephson, Anzia Yezierska
actors: Bryant Washburn, Helen Ferguson, E. Alyn Warren
plot: A Hollywood adaptation of the short stories of Anzia Yazierska, the first writer to bring stories of American Jewish women to a mainstream audience, Hungry Hearts focuses on the hopes and hardships of the Levin family, Jewish immi...
